message:
feat(routing): integrate Agent Mail file reservations (ntm-03ae)

Add reservation-aware routing support:
- AgentMailConfig for configuring reservation integration
- ReservationCache with 30s TTL for caching active reservations
- File path extraction from prompts (ExtractFilePaths)
- Affinity bonus for agents holding matching file reservations
- ReservationWarning in RoutingResult for conflict detection
- ScoreAgentsWithContext for context-aware scoring with cache refresh
- Pane-to-agent-name mapping for coordination

Config options:
- enabled: Enable/disable reservation integration
- reservation_bonus: Affinity bonus (default: 30)
- respect_reservations: Warn vs exclude non-holders
- cache_ttl: Reservation cache TTL (default: 30s)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
